channel.title: Boletim diário de segurança e TI
channel.description: Feed curado com criticidade, categoria, CVEs e resumo diário.

item.title: Resumo do dia | 11/03/2026 | Phishing e Identidade
item.description:
Resumo do dia

Data: 11/03/2026 14:32 (BRT)

Tipo de boletim: Phishing e Identidade

Totais:
- Itens novos: 12
- Criticidade Alta: 11
- Criticidade Média: 1
- Criticidade Baixa: 0
- Patches/CVEs: 10
- Ameaças: 0
- Breaches/Vazamentos: 1
- Identidade/Phishing: 1
- Cloud/DevSecOps: 0

Destaques prioritários:

1. [Alta] CISA Flags SolarWinds, Ivanti, and Workspace One Vulnerabilities as Actively Exploited (The Hacker News)

2. [Alta] Critical n8n Flaws Allow Remote Code Execution and Exposure of Stored Credentials (The Hacker News)

3. [Alta] Microsoft Patches 84 Flaws in March Patch Tuesday, Including Two Public Zero-Days (The Hacker News)

Patches e CVEs em destaque:

1. [Alta] CISA Flags SolarWinds, Ivanti, and Workspace One Vulnerabilities as Actively Exploited | CVE-2021-22054

2. [Alta] Critical n8n Flaws Allow Remote Code Execution and Exposure of Stored Credentials | CVE-2026-27577, CVE-2026-27493

3. [Alta] Microsoft Patches 84 Flaws in March Patch Tuesday, Including Two Public Zero-Days | sem CVE explícito

Ameaças e campanhas:

Nenhuma ameaça em destaque.
